description: Join table: exact per-(capability x source) presence + deep doc URLs for the benchmark capability matrix (#352, child fan-out of #346/#315). Open-world: a row asserts a capability is present in a source. Seed rows are inferred from benchmarkCapabilities.notableIn (provenance notable-inference, url pending); per-source extraction slices upgrade each to provenance verified with a deep doc url, and add the sources notableIn omitted. Absence of a row = not-yet-extracted, never proven-absent.
method: Per corpus source (benchmarkCorpus.sources[].id), walk its docs from docsUrl, and for each benchmarkCapabilities.capabilities[].id decide presence by the same kind tests the corpus uses (component/pattern/token/standard). Record a row { capabilityId, sourceId, present:true, provenance:"verified", sourceName:<as that vendor names it>, url:<deep link to the component/pattern doc> }. Re-runs diff cleanly: one row per verified (capability,source); never rewrite the whole file. notable-inference rows are the floor, upgraded in place to verified.

provenanceKinds.test: Seeded from benchmarkCapabilities.notableIn — the capability is flagged notable in this source but the exact doc URL is not yet captured.
A per-source extraction slice confirmed presence against the source docs and recorded the deep url + sourceName.
